description: You are a podcast producer preparing Episode 47 of 'The Finance Hour' for multi-platform distribution. Using the raw components in /home/ga/Music/raw_podcast/ (intro.wav, episode_raw.wav, and outro.wav) and the specifications in /home/ga/Documents/production_spec.txt, deliver a complete episode (intro, episode, then outro) to /home/ga/Music/podcast_output/. Required outputs include a lossless master (WAV, 44.1kHz, stereo), a distribution copy (MP3, 192kbps) with ID3 metadata (Title='Episode 47: Market Analysis', Artist='The Finance Hour', Album='Season 3', Track=47), and
